title: Turkish-Style Kunefe with a Twist
description: A fusion of Turkish and Indian flavors in this rich kunefe dessert, topped with a garlicky naan crust.
instructions: 2. Roll out the naan dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
3. Transfer the dough to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Mix the cheese, cardamom, and rosewater in a bowl.
5. Spread the cheese mixture over the naan dough, leaving a 1-inch border.
6. Top with kunefe and turkish delight.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and brush with ghee and melted butter.
9. Sprinkle sugar over the top and serve warm.
